channel.title: AI & Tech News Aggregator
channel.description: Aggregated AI and Tech news from 11 sources

item.title: Peppa Pig and Transformers owner Hasbro hit by cyber-attack
item.description: [BBC Technology] The firm says its operations remain open but says the hack "may result in some delays".

item.title: ‘Uncanny Valley’: Iran’s Threats on US Tech, Trump’s Plans for Midterms, and Polymarket’s Pop-up Flop
item.description: [WIRED AI] In this episode, we discuss Iran’s threats to target US tech firms, gear up for the midterm elections, and get a scene report from the Polymarket pop-up bar in DC.

item.title: The latest AI-powered martech news and releases
item.description: [MarTech] AI chatbots are now ignoring instructions and going off-script — because apparently even automation tools can get bored with their jobs. The post The latest AI-powered martech news and releases appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Fewer UK adults posting on social media, Ofcom finds
item.description: [BBC Technology] Some experts believe it highlights a social media shift as platforms boost short video.

item.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX set to be worth $1 trillion with planned public listing
item.description: [BBC Technology] The company’s public stock debut is set to be one of the most valuable in history, and could make Musk the world's first trillionaire.

item.title: How China fell for a lobster: What an AI assistant tells us about Beijing's ambition
item.description: [BBC Technology] The AI agent sparked a frenzy of "raising lobsters" in March, with users training the tool to suit their needs.

item.title: Suno is a music copyright nightmare
item.description: [The Verge AI] AI music platform Suno's policy is that it does not permit the use of copyrighted material. You can upload your own tracks to remix or set your original lyrics to AI-generated music. But, it's supposed to recognize and stop you from using other people's songs and lyrics. Now, no system is perfect, b

item.title: I let Gemini in Google Maps plan my day and it went surprisingly well
item.description: [The Verge AI] You may be familiar with Gemini as the thing that's in every Google service you use - whether you want it or not. While it's been a constant, sometimes unwelcome presence in Gmail for at least the past year, it's a relatively new addition to Maps. And you know what? It's kind of great. To […]

item.title: Grammarly’s sloppelganger saga
item.description: [The Verge AI] This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on the ups and downs of AI, follow Stevie Bonifield. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. How it started Most people probably know Grammarly

item.title: 36氪首发 | 清华系团队研发矿石AI智能分选机，完成近2亿元C轮融资
item.description: [36氪] 作者丨欧雪 编辑丨袁斯来 硬氪获悉，矿石AI智能分选设备企业——北京霍里思特科技有限公司（下称“霍里思特”）已完成近2亿元C轮融资，由招商局资本领投，京国瑞、大兴产投、北创投、开源思创及初辉资本跟投。本轮资金将主要用于核心技术研发、全球化业务拓展及团队建设。 霍里思特成立于2010年，是国内在全矿种（有色、黑色、非金属、放射性及煤矿）均有智能分选大量落地应用的设备供应商。公司核心团队源自清华大学精密仪器系国家重点实验室，创始人郭劲为清华精密仪器系硕士，曾任职GE医疗CT部门。公司在X射线光谱分析与AI智能识别算法领域有近二十年科研积累。 硬氪获悉，传统选矿主要依赖人工手选或湿法

item.title: 高端智能投影品牌AWOL Vision获近亿元B轮融资，新品拿下近2000万美金众筹｜硬氪首发
item.description: [36氪] 作者｜黄楠 编辑｜袁斯来 硬氪获悉，高端智能投影品牌AWOL Vision近日完成近亿元B轮融资，投资方包括天堂硅谷、会畅科技及金鹏佳等机构。资金将主要用于核心技术研发，持续迭代超短焦与长焦激光显示能力，并推进“家庭AI智能娱乐平台”生态构建；同时加快全球渠道与品牌拓展，强化供应链协同，并引入顶尖人才以夯实全球化运营基础。 AWOL Vision成立于2020年，长期专注RGB激光投影与家庭视听体验创新，并以深圳海高特科技有限公司作为其研发与设计中枢，为全球视听领域用户提供更具沉浸感的解决方案，重塑家庭娱乐体验。 3月31日，AWOL Vision新款超短焦4K三色激光投影产品

item.title: Apple at 50: Three products that changed how we live - and three that really didn't
item.description: [BBC Technology] On the tech giant's 50th year, we ask analysts to give their top three Apple successes and misses

item.title: A folk musician became a target for AI fakes and a copyright troll
item.description: [The Verge AI] In January, folk artist Murphy Campbell discovered several songs on her Spotify profile that did not belong there. They were songs that she had recorded, but she'd never uploaded them to Spotify, and something was off about the vocals. She quickly surmised that someone had pulled performances of the

item.title: Hackers Are Posting the Claude Code Leak With Bonus Malware
item.description: [WIRED AI] Plus: The FBI says a recent hack of its wiretap tools poses a national security risk, attackers stole Cisco source code as part of an ongoing supply chain hacking spree, and more.

item.title: Nasa astronauts reach safe orbit in historic moon mission
item.description: [Business Times] [AUSTIN] Nasa’s crew of astronauts launched to space and reached a stable orbit, kicking off a landmark journey that will take them...

item.title: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google unite to combat model copying in China
item.description: [Business Times] Trump administration officials have signalled their openness to fostering information sharing among AI companies to rein in adversarial distillation

item.title: Samsung flags eightfold jump in Q1 profit as AI chip demand drives up prices
item.description: [Straits Times] Chipmakers are struggling to keep up with demand from AI data centres.

item.title: Businesses scramble to get noticed by AI search
item.description: [BBC Technology] Firms are changing the way they present information on their websites, so they get noticed by AI.

item.title: 【钛晨报】商务部等6部门：更好服务实体经济，推进电子商务高质量发展；苹果首款折叠屏手机已在试产；8个产油国决定自5月起将原油日产量上调20.6万桶
item.description: [钛媒体] 红果短剧：针对近期AI短剧素材违规使用问题频发的情况，已处置作品670部；小鹏回应澳大利亚独家经销商合作破裂；京东团购上线，百万餐饮门店开启试运营；日本马自达因危机停止生产面向中东出口的汽车；Meta超级智能部门据悉正组建专属硬件团队，深耕AI硬件设备；OpenClaw遭“限流”，Anthropic对第三方工具调用Claude额外收费；商务部等9部门联合印发《服务消费提质惠民行动2026年工作方案》；国家网信办征求意见：禁止诱导未成年人沉迷数字虚拟人服务；两部门：引导供销合作社再生资源回收企业规范锂电池回收、贮存等关键环节，加强与锂电池综合利用企业合作；十部门：开展人工智能科技活动应将科技伦理

item.title: Air India CEO Campbell Wilson resigns, Mint reports
item.description: [Straits Times] Singapore Airlines holds a 25 per cent stake in Air India.

item.title: Samsung flags eightfold jump in Q1 profit as AI chip demand drives up prices
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Broadcom signs long-term deal to develop Google’s custom AI chips
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Helium shortage yet to hit Singapore's semicon, healthcare sectors, but prolonged disruption may push costs up
item.description: [CNA Tech] Helium is used in advanced chip production and in MRI machines in hospitals.

item.title: OpenAI urges California, Delaware to investigate Musk's 'anti-competitive behavior’
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: OpenAI alums have been quietly investing from a new, potentially $100M fund
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Zero Shot, a new venture capital fund with deep ties to OpenAI, is aiming to raise $100 million for its first fund. It has already written some checks.

item.title: Nvidia acquisition of SchedMD sparks worry among AI specialists about software access
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Amazon strikes deal with USPS that maintains 80% of package volume
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Google quietly launched an AI dictation app that works offline
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Google's new offline-first dictation app uses Gemma AI models to take on the apps like Wispr Flow.

item.title: Iran threatens ‘Stargate’ AI data centers
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Iran said it will target U.S.-linked data centers with new missile strikes, as the war between the U.S. and Iran escalates.

item.title: OpenAI’s vision for the AI economy: public wealth funds, robot taxes, and a four-day workweek
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] OpenAI proposes taxes on AI profits, public wealth funds, and expanded safety nets to address job loss and inequality, blending redistribution with capitalism as policymakers debate AI’s economic impact.

item.title: Iran threatens OpenAI’s Stargate data center in Abu Dhabi
item.description: [The Verge AI] Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) has published a video threatening OpenAI's planned Abu Dhabi data center if the US follows through on threats to attack the country's power plants, as reported earlier by Tom's Hardware. The video, which was published to an Iranian state-backed news ou

item.title: Cisco CEO Chuck Robbins wants data centers in space
item.description: [The Verge AI] Today, I’m talking with Chuck Robbins, CEO of Cisco. Cisco is one of those big companies that everyone has heard of but that most of us don’t have to interact with very much; it’s not really a consumer brand. But all of us are in some way using Cisco’s products and services every day because [&#8230

item.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications open: a chance for VC access, TechCrunch coverage, and $100K
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Nominate your startup, or one you know that deserves the spotlight, and finish the process by applying. Selected 200 have a chance at VC access, TechCrunch coverage, and $100K for Startup Battlefield 200. Applications close on May 27.

item.title: AI and empathy define the next era of marketing systems
item.description: [MarTech] The real opportunity with AI is not scale alone, but designing experiences that reduce friction and support both customers and teams. The post AI and empathy define the next era of marketing systems appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: How to use the new ChatGPT app integrations, including DoorDash, Spotify, Uber, and others
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Learn how to use Spotify, Canva, Figma, Expedia, and other apps directly in ChatGPT.

item.title: Three first-party data strategies retail brands are prioritizing now
item.description: [MarTech] As 3rd-party cookies fade, mid-market retailers are leaning on direct value exchanges, ID-driven experiences and zero-party signals to rebuild their data. The post Three first-party data strategies retail brands are prioritizing now appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Why AI-driven creative is failing and how to fix it
item.description: [MarTech] From Coca-Cola to Svedka, poor execution is undermining AI-driven creative. Learn how to use genAI in ways that support storytelling. The post Why AI-driven creative is failing and how to fix it appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: AI adoption fails at the human level
item.description: [MarTech] The biggest blocker to AI isn’t technology. It’s fear, risk perception and past experience. Here’s how to address what’s really holding teams back. The post AI adoption fails at the human level appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Singapore stocks close higher on April 6; STI up 0.5%
item.description: [Straits Times] The STI gains 24.9 points to finish at 4,972.40 points.

item.title: 科氪 | 荣耀与京东签订战略合作协议 推进AI、机器人、C2M共创合作
item.description:
[36氪] 4月2日，荣耀与京东签订战略合作协议，正式建立全方位战略合作伙伴关系，双方将围绕产品共创、用户共营、生态共享三大核心领域，构建全面覆盖、深度融合、价值共生的新型合作体系，致力于实现三年累计规模超1000亿元的全领域合作目标。
官方图片 产品共创方面，荣耀与京东将围绕手机、全场景、AIoT、机器人等各领域产品的全生命周期进行深度协作。双方将推进战略新品首发合作，共同打造行业爆品，基于各自优势，联合开展IP与C2M定制项目，推动行业级创新。双方将针对外卖骑手、快递员、游戏玩家等特定用户人群进行产品共创，将荣耀的软硬件定制能力与京东的用户洞察有机结合，打造更多基于场景的产品亮点，同时，

item.title: The Ridiculously Nerdy Intel Bet That Could Rake in Billions
item.description: [WIRED AI] Advanced chip packaging is suddenly at the center of the AI boom. Intel is going all in.

item.title: AI 泡沫的时间大考：霍尔木兹只是导火索，内因才是炸药
item.description: [钛媒体] 霍尔木兹日均通行量暴跌90%，氦气断供、电价飙升、中东资本回流、AI研发人才被征召——四重冲击正在考验AI产业的高估值叙事。

item.title: Ships with Qatar LNG attempt first Hormuz exit since Iran war started
item.description: [Straits Times] Two tankers carrying LNG from Qatar appear to be heading toward the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Singapore retail sales rebound in February on CNY boost, but outlook clouded by Iran war
item.description: [Straits Times] The inflationary impact of war could weigh on consumers’ purchasing power.

item.title: 众筹300万美元的Agent盒子，想彻底解决你的算力焦虑
item.description: [36氪] 作者 | 张子怡 编辑 | 袁斯来 AI硬件赛道，似乎一夜之间跨入新世界。 上一个月，投资人还在打听硬件大厂高P创始人，这一个月，他们已经开始寻觅“下一个Mac mini”。 狂欢的起点，来自开源智能体框架OpenClaw（圈子里称为：龙虾）。从抢购大内存的Mac mini到各类软硬大厂的联名主机，FOMO恐惧症席卷着所有人。承载AI的硬件，如今成了不可错失的入口。 此前更多在极客圈子里风行的Agent Box忽然被推到前台。简单说，Agent Box就是⼀台面向个人用户的AI专用设备，其存在的唯⼀目的是在本地运行大模型和自主代理。

item.title: From number-crunching to decision-making: Teo Ser Luck on how AI is reshaping accounting
item.description: [Straits Times] The Institute of Singapore Chartered Accountants president said AI is good for accounting, but grads must up their game.

item.title: OpenAI IPO前夜：CFO说不，COO被调走
item.description: [钛媒体] 财务路线的内部撕裂与高管团队的集中缺位交织在一起。

item.title: AI短剧，苦等一个《狂飙》
item.description: [钛媒体] 产能爆炸，爆款消失。

item.title: 满地小板凳
item.description: [钛媒体] 在 AI 把创作和开发门槛不断拉低的当下，越来越多三十出头的上班族，开始在深夜一遍遍做那些暂时无用、却真实属于自己的“小板凳”。它未必立刻变现，却会留下手感、能力，以及把自己一点点捡回来的力量

item.title: 大模型生死局：从六小龙到双雄上市，AI创业的泡沫、突围与终局
item.description: [钛媒体] 上市不是上岸。

item.title: Meta Pauses Work With Mercor After Data Breach Puts AI Industry Secrets at Risk
item.description: [WIRED AI] Major AI labs are investigating a security incident that impacted Mercor, a leading data vendor. The incident could have exposed key data about how they train AI models.

item.title: OpenAI’s Fidji Simo Is Taking Medical Leave Amid an Executive Shake-Up
item.description: [WIRED AI] The company is undergoing major leadership restructuring as its CEO of AGI deployment goes on leave for “several weeks.”

item.title: Your AI governance gap is bigger than you think
item.description: [MarTech] AI is already being used across your organization. Audit tools, set guardrails and reduce risk with a practical governance framework. The post Your AI governance gap is bigger than you think appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: 神州数码2025年营收超1400亿，AI相关业务增长近五成｜最前线
item.description: [36氪] 作者｜黄楠 编辑｜袁斯来 神州数码（000034.SZ）2025年全年业绩报告近日发布。 财报显示，公司全年实现营业收入1438亿元，同比增长12%，营收规模连续三年稳步攀升。其中，AI相关业务成为核心增长引擎，全年收入达330亿元，同比增长了48%，正式迈入规模化落地期，成为与传统分销业务并重的当期增长极。 具体到业务板块，高价值战略业务呈现爆发式增长。以神州问学为核心的AI软件及服务业务营收1.1亿元，同比增长了165.4%，企业级Agent中台进入商业化变现阶段；数云服务及软件业务营收35.6亿元，同比增长22%；自有品牌神州鲲泰算力产品营收同比增长62.4%达到74.4

item.title: The 3 Best Portable Jump Starters in 2026: Get Charged Up
item.description: [WIRED AI] The new crop of portable jump starters means you'll never be stuck waiting on a tow. Here are the devices we'd trust.

item.title: 阅文“AI拟真人大讲堂”：好故事才是AI时代的未来
item.description: [36氪] 如今内容行业风头正盛的莫过于AI拟真人剧。 它是从AI漫剧这一赛道中生长出来的内容形态，也是视频生成大模型飞跃式进步下的产物。 早在2025年下半年的时候，这一内容形态就已经崭露头角。彼时有一批从业者认为，AI拟真人剧的天花板相当于整个传统影视行业，要高于AI漫剧，于是在诸多��术问题尚未被解决的时候就决定入局。 今年1月以来，字节旗下Seedance2.0、生数科技Vidu Q3的发布则彻底引爆了这一赛道。人物表情的恐怖谷效应、角色难以保持的一致性，以及打斗场面不连贯等问题，都在底层大模型技术的进步中消融。 Vidu解决方案负责人郑重如此表示，视频生成大模型在过去一年中，从“
